title: Wad is Eva 04 and its Pilot is
display_title: Wad is Eva 04 and its Pilot is
wikitext:
[]: Wad is Eva #04 and its Pilot is ???             Quote Post by danlim7 » Sat Nov 07, 2009 1:24 am 00 - Rei 01 - Shinji 02 - Asuka 03 - Asuka 04 - ????? 05 - Mari 06 - Kaworu Did 04 appear at all?

[]:             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Sat Nov 07, 2009 1:30 am Unit-04 suffered the same fate as in the series. Mysterious disappearance, along with a good chunk of western USA.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 07, 2009 2:20 am Unit 04 went explode. It never had a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Nov 07, 2009 5:54 am Eva 04's pilot was Terry Toren. An ancestor to Smith Toren.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Nov 07, 2009 6:23 am A better question would be who might pilot Units 7 and 8 for speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Nov 07, 2009 7:05 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: A better question would be who might pilot Units 7 and 8 for speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 07, 2009 1:03 pm Since Eva-08 is quickened with the pilot then it's Shinji damnit! Shinji! ...Maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Nov 07, 2009 6:14 pm But what is the point of Unit- 08 if it IS Shinji who will be the pilot? I mean IMO why would they have 08 if chogokin seems to be what they need for Instrumentality, at least thats the impression I get from watching the series and EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Nov 08, 2009 2:33 am Well, clearly Unit 01 isn't something to be piloted if it's going to almost destroy the planet whenever you turn it on.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Nov 08, 2009 2:41 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: I mean IMO why would they have 08 if chogokin seems to be what they need for Instrumentality, at least thats the impression I get from watching the series and EoE.
